channel.title: Vnc on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Vnc on Pi Stack

item.title: noVNC vs TigerVNC vs X11VNC: Best Self-Hosted VNC Server Guide 2026
item.description: Virtual Network Computing (VNC) remains one of the most widely used protocols for remote desktop access. Whether you need to manage a headless Linux server, provide remote support to users, or access your desktop from anywhere, a self-hosted VNC solution gives you full control over your data and infrastructure.
